title: Fetch Solar Wind Data
description: Ensure GET /api/weather/forecast/global returns valid JSON telemetry array.

title: Fetch Historical Telemetry
description: Ensure GET /api/weather/telemetry/history returns historical Kp index and telemetry data.

title: Register Alert Subscription
description: Ensure POST /api/alerts/subscribe accepts email, target_location, latitude, and longitude.
